---
title: "The history of the Davenport family, in which is displayed a striking contrast between haughty indolence and healthful activity  . . ."
---

## The history of the Davenport family, in which is displayed a striking contrast between haughty indolence and healthful activity  . . .

**Author:** H. S.
**Date:** 1798
**Imprint:** London: Newbery

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
